title: A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
desc: A jaded journalist assigned to profile Fred Rogers (Tom Hanks) is gradually transformed by the TV host's empathy and decency. Based on a true friendship.

title: The Accountant 2
desc: Autistic forensic accountant Christian Wolff and his lethal brother investigate a murder tied to a deadly conspiracy.

title: Sense and Sensibility
desc: Two sisters of contrasting temperaments navigate love and financial hardship in Georgian England. Austen.

title: A Man for All Seasons
desc: Sir Thomas More refuses to endorse Henry VIII's divorce, at the cost of his life. Based on history.

title: My Fair Lady
desc: A phonetics professor bets he can pass off a Cockney flower girl as a duchess. Musical.

title: Kung Fu Hustle
desc: In 1940s Shanghai, a wannabe gangster stumbles into a slum that secretly harbors retired kung fu masters as rival gangs descend. Cantonese.

title: The King of Comedy
desc: An obsessive aspiring comedian stalks and kidnaps a late-night TV host to force his big break. Scorsese satire.

title: Back to the Future Part II
desc: Marty and Doc travel to 2015 and an altered 1985, then back to 1955 to repair the timeline.

title: Perfect Days
desc: A Tokyo public-toilet cleaner finds beauty and contentment in the quiet routines of his simple daily life.

title: Hamnet
desc: Shakespeare and his wife Agnes grieve the death of their young son — a loss that echoes in the play Hamlet.

title: Lage Raho Munna Bhai
desc: A Mumbai gangster, visited by visions of Mahatma Gandhi, adopts 'Gandhigiri' (Gandhian principles) to win a radio host's heart and right local wrongs. Hindi comedy.

title: Short Term 12
desc: A young supervisor at a group home for at-risk teens (Brie Larson) bonds with a troubled new resident while confronting her own past.

title: Central Station (Central do Brasil)
desc: A jaded letter-writer reluctantly helps an orphaned boy travel across Brazil to find his father.

title: 12 Monkeys
desc: A convict is sent back in time to trace the source of a plague that nearly wiped out humanity.

title: The Best Years of Our Lives
desc: Three WWII veterans return home to the same town and struggle to readjust to civilian life.

title: Fargo
desc: A pregnant Minnesota police chief investigates a botched kidnapping scheme that leaves a trail of bodies.

title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance
desc: A senator returns for a funeral and recalls how he really became famous for killing a notorious outlaw.

title: The Truman Show
desc: An insurance salesman slowly discovers his entire life is an elaborate reality-TV show broadcast to the world from a giant domed set.

title: Groundhog Day
desc: A cynical weatherman is trapped reliving the same day until he changes his outlook on life.

title: Pirates of the Caribbean: The Curse of the Black Pearl
desc: Roguish Capt. Jack Sparrow and a young blacksmith chase a crew of cursed, undead pirates to rescue the governor's daughter.

title: Tourist Family
desc: A Sri Lankan Tamil family illegally settles in India and wins over a wary neighborhood through kindness and humor.

title: Jurassic Park
desc: A billionaire's island theme park of cloned dinosaurs turns deadly when the attractions break loose during a preview tour.

title: Dial M for Murder
desc: A husband blackmails a man into murdering his wealthy wife, but the plan goes fatally awry.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
desc: A small-town Southern lawyer defends a Black man falsely accused of rape, seen through his daughter's eyes.

title: Braveheart
desc: 13th-century Scottish warrior William Wallace leads a rebellion against English rule after personal tragedy.

title: Witness for the Prosecution
desc: An ailing barrister defends a man accused of murder in a courtroom drama full of twists.

title: Raiders of the Lost Ark
desc: Archaeologist Indiana Jones races the Nazis to recover the fabled Ark of the Covenant.

title: Rear Window
desc: A wheelchair-bound photographer becomes convinced a neighbor across the courtyard has committed murder.

title: The Pianist
desc: A Polish-Jewish pianist struggles to survive in Warsaw during the Nazi occupation. Based on a true story.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
desc: A reprogrammed Terminator protects young John Connor from the deadlier, shape-shifting T-1000 sent back in time to kill him.

title: The Green Mile
desc: A Depression-era death-row guard encounters a gentle giant inmate who possesses a miraculous healing gift.

title: It's a Wonderful Life
desc: A despairing small-town man is shown by an angel how many lives he touched, and what his town would be without him.

title: Saving Private Ryan
desc: After D-Day, a U.S. Army captain leads a squad behind enemy lines to find and bring home a paratrooper whose brothers were killed.

title: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
desc: A rebellious new patient galvanizes the residents of a mental ward against its quietly tyrannical head nurse.

title: Seven Samurai
desc: A poor farming village hires seven masterless samurai to defend it from marauding bandits. Japanese.

title: Goodfellas
desc: The rise and fall of mob associate Henry Hill across three decades in the New York Mafia. Based on a true story.

title: The Matrix
desc: A hacker discovers reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against the machines that enslave humanity.

title: Inception
desc: A thief who steals secrets through dreams is hired to plant an idea deep in a target's subconscious.

title: Forrest Gump
desc: A kind-hearted Alabama man with a low IQ unwittingly shapes decades of American history.

title: Schindler's List
desc: A German businessman saves over a thousand Jewish refugees by employing them. Based on a true story.
